fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that is copied from the Tracking Specification table, when a serial number information record is created.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies this number from the Tracking Specification table when a serial number information record is created.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the serial no. information record.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment has been recorded for the serial number.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory quantity of the specified serial number.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
For more information, see How to: Enter Dates and Times.

fields.name: Location Filter
fields.tooltip:
Displays the filter that filters by location.
If the field contains a location code, the values in the Inventory field and the Expired Inventory field are based only on entries with the location code that is included in the filter.

fields.name: Bin Filter
fields.tooltip:
Displays the filter that filters by bin code.
If the field contains a bin code, the Inventory and the Expired Inventory field values are based only on item tracking entries with the bin code that is included in the filter.


Meaning


Sample Expression


Included


Equal to

1

Entries with 1 as the bin code


Interval

1...5

Entries from bin 1 through bin 5


Either/or

B22|C22

Entries with either bin code B22 or C22


Different than

<>bin1

Entries with all bin codes except bin 1


To see the bin codes in the Bin table, choose the field.

fields.name: Expired Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory of the serial number with an expiration date before the posting date on the associated document.
